title: The Mom Test
author: Rob Fitzpatrick
description: Learn to ask questions that even your mom can't lie about through 4 Claude Code skills covering good questions, validation traps, commitment tests, and customer segmentation.
longDescription: Rob Fitzpatrick's concise guide teaches founders how to talk to customers without getting lied to. These 4 skills encode the core rules — crafting questions that extract truth instead of flattery, recognizing empty validation, testing for real commitment, and segmenting conversations to find patterns — so you can validate ideas before building the wrong thing.
